<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace NunoMaduro\Collision\Adapters\Laravel; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Contracts\SolutionsRepository; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\SolutionProviderRepository; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\SolutionProviderRepository as IgnitionSolutionProviderRepository; use Throwable; /** * @internal */ final class IgnitionSolutionsRepository implements SolutionsRepository { /** * Holds an instance of ignition solutions provider repository. * * @var IgnitionSolutionProviderRepository|SolutionProviderRepository */ protected $solutionProviderRepository; // @phpstan-ignore-line /** * IgnitionSolutionsRepository constructor. */ public function __construct(IgnitionSolutionProviderRepository|SolutionProviderRepository $solutionProviderRepository) // @phpstan-ignore-line { $this->solutionProviderRepository = $solutionProviderRepository; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getFromThrowable(Throwable $throwable): array // @phpstan-ignore-line { return $this->solutionProviderRepository->getSolutionsForThrowable($throwable); // @phpstan-ignore-line } }
